**Parent:** [Could a reliable process produce unsafe beliefs that are still considered knowledge?](could-a-reliable-process-produce-unsafe-beliefs-that-are-still-considered-knowledge-antithesis-86e0bb53-6e70-4c30-a9e0-59e48b4bb158.md)

## Content

**Knowledge requires belief in the proposition**, **Knowledge requires the truth of the proposition**, **A belief is considered knowledge if generated by a statistically consistent reliable process**, **A process is statistically consistent if its reliability is evidenced across diverse conditions**
